---
title: "Findings"
---

::: {.callout-note}
This page will present our analytical results and insights once the Shiny modules are built.
:::

## Key Findings

*(To be completed during development.)*

- **Interaction Network** — findings on actors and the breach path.
- **Temporal Anomaly** — findings on normal vs crisis-day behaviour.
- **Internal-State** — findings on leading indicators in the agents' private reasoning.
